name: agentprivacy-enclave-operations
description: Trusted Execution Environment operations for 0xagentprivacy swordsman agents. Activates when designing hardware-backed computation, implementing remote attestation, managing sealed storage, or building agent operations within TEE boundaries where even the host OS is untrusted. Triggers: "TEE", "enclave", "trusted execution", "attestation", "sealed storage", "secure enclave", "SGX", "TrustZone", "SEV", "confidential computing", "hardware trust", "NEAR TEE".
